name: Qiiwi Games AB (publ)
summary: Qiiwi Games AB (publ) develops games for mobile platforms, such as iOS and Android. It has strategic cooperation agreements with All3Media International to develop and publish a word game for the detective drama Midsomer Murders and a match-3 game for the reality television series Kitchen Nightmares. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Alings√É¬•s, Sweden.
